connected_app_id.description: The ID of the Connected App.

name.description: The name of the Connected App.

description.description: A description of the Connected App.

client_type.description: The type of Connected App. Supported values are `first_party`, `first_party_public`, `third_party`, and `third_party_public`.

scopes_granted.description: The scopes granted to the Connected App at the completion of the last authorization flow.

logo_url.description: The logo URL of the Connected App, if any.
